display_name:
Ray2 is a large–scale video generative model capable of creating realistic visuals with natural, coherent motion. It has strong understanding of text instructions and can also take image input. 

Opti
description:
Ray2 is a large–scale video generative model capable of creating realistic visuals with natural, coherent motion. It has strong understanding of text instructions and can also take image input. 

Optional parameters:
Can produce videos from 540p to 4k resolution and with either 5/9s durations. 
Aspect ratio available (21:9, 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16, 9:21)
